changelog: EMERGENCY ROLLBACK of v1.43.86 — that build crashed immediately on launch on user devices. Disabled the Coil bundled-asset mapper and the BundleOverrides on-launch load. Bundled assets are still in the APK but are not yet wired up. Effective behaviour matches v1.43.85 — i.e. the focus magnify + glow are still gone, sync still works, screensaver fix still works, layout-modal fix still works, but the streaming-services row still hits the TMDB CDN as before.
Mandatory upgrade so users stuck in the v1.43.86 crash loop get pulled out automatically.

Re-enabling the bundled mapper requires safer Coil registration with explicit type form (add(mapper, Class.java)) plus exhaustive runCatching in the mapper — will ship in a follow-up after we can reproduce the crash.
